name: Garlic & Parmesan Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large heavy pot, heat the corn oil and olive oil over high heat until the oil smokes.
2. Add 1 kernel of popping corn and heat until it pops.
3. Add the split garlic cloves and the rest of the popping corn. Cover the pot and gently shake it until the popping starts.
4. Vigorously shake the pot until the popping subsides.
5. Remove from heat. Remove the garlic, then toss the popcorn with Parmesan, minced garlic, cayenne pepper, and salt.
